sections.title: About To — Introduction and Formula
sections.explanation: About To is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: Subject + am/is/are + about to + base verb (action happening very soon/immediately). Rules: 'About to' shows an action that is going to happen immediately or very soon | Formula: am/is/are + about to + base verb | More immediate than 'going to' — usually within seconds/minutes | Negative: am/is/are not about to
sections.formula: Subject + am/is/are + about to + base verb (action happening very soon/immediately)

examples.hindi: ट्रेन अभी छूटने वाली है।
examples.english: The train is about to leave.

examples.hindi: मैं अभी सोने वाला हूँ।
examples.english: I am about to go to sleep.

examples.hindi: वह अभी बोलने वाली है।
examples.english: She is about to speak.

examples.hindi: बारिश अभी शुरू होने वाली है।
examples.english: It is about to rain.

examples.hindi: मीटिंग अभी शुरू होने वाली है।
examples.english: The meeting is about to start.

examples.hindi: मैं अभी घर से निकलने वाला हूँ।
examples.english: I am about to leave home.

sections.title: About To — Daily Life Usage
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using About To for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Subject + am/is/are + about to + base verb (action happening very soon/immediately)

examples.hindi: वह अभी रोने वाली है।
examples.english: She is about to cry.

examples.hindi: हम अभी खाना खाने वाले हैं।
examples.english: We are about to eat food.

examples.hindi: सूरज अभी डूबने वाला है।
examples.english: The sun is about to set.

examples.hindi: मैं अभी यह decision लेने वाला हूँ।
examples.english: I am about to make this decision.

examples.hindi: वह अभी जवाब देने वाला है।
examples.english: He is about to answer.

examples.hindi: फिल्म अभी शुरू होने वाली है।
examples.english: The movie is about to start.

sections.title: About To — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: About To — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice About To in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Subject + am/is/are + about to + base verb (action happening very soon/immediately)

examples.hindi: मैं अभी माफी मांगने वाला हूँ।
examples.english: I am about to apologize.

examples.hindi: वे अभी पहुँचने वाले हैं।
examples.english: They are about to arrive.

examples.hindi: मैं अभी यह गलती करने वाला था, पर रुक गया।
examples.english: I was about to make this mistake, but I stopped.

examples.hindi: वह अभी सो जाने वाली है।
examples.english: She is about to fall asleep.

sections.title: About To — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: About To — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using About To. Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Subject + am/is/are + about to + base verb (action happening very soon/immediately)

examples.hindi: हम अभी शुरू करने वाले हैं।
examples.english: We are about to begin.

examples.hindi: दुकान अभी बंद होने वाली है।
examples.english: The shop is about to close.

examples.hindi: मैं अभी उसे फोन करने वाला हूँ।
examples.english: I am about to call him.

examples.hindi: बच्चा अभी गिरने वाला था।
examples.english: The child was about to fall.
